page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7a-nps1.8xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores and 32 vCPUs utilizing the x86_64 architecture, driven by an AMD EPYC 7T83 processor operating at a base frequency of 2.55 GHz. The system is equipped with 256.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. This instance does not include local storage or GPU hardware accelerators, relying instead on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 8 Gbps.

In performance evaluations, the instance demonstrates strong single-core capabilities, with stress-ng single-core CPU performance and PassMark memory scores ranking in the top 25%. Multi-core CPU performance, database operations, and memory bandwidth tests fall within the average range. Specifically, the system achieves a PassMark CPU score of 38,143.99 and handles 30.68 million Redis SET operations per second. Cryptographic and vector processing are supported via hardware flags such as AES, VAES, SHA_NI, and AVX, though AVX-512 extensions are not present.

The high memory density of 8.0 GB per core makes this instance class highly cost-efficient for memory-bound workloads that do not require local NVMe storage or GPU acceleration. It is well-suited for hosting large-scale databases, in-memory caching layers like Redis, enterprise applications, and memory-intensive data processing pipelines.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7a-nps1.8xlarge is an x86_64 memory-optimized server instance featuring 32 dedicated vCPUs and 32 physical cores powered by an AMD EPYC 7T83 processor running at 2.55 GHz. It is configured with 256.0 GB of RAM, yielding a high resource density of 8.0 GB per core, while lacking local storage and GPU accelerators. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, the instance delivers 8 Gbps of baseline network bandwidth. Benchmark results highlight strong single-core CPU and memory performance, alongside average multi-core and database execution speeds. This hardware profile is highly cost-efficient for memory-intensive deployments that do not require local NVMe drives. It is recommended for in-memory databases, caching layers, enterprise applications, and data processing workloads.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7a-nps1.8xlarge is a memory-optimized instance with 32 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and 8 Gbps network bandwidth, ideal for in-memory databases and enterprise apps.

tagline: A dedicated AMD EPYC virtual server offering high memory density and strong single-core performance for memory-bound enterprise workloads.

High memory-to-CPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core
Strong single-core CPU and memory benchmark performance
8 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with KVM hypervisor
Best suited for in-memory databases, caching, and enterprise applications
